No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly discusses 'Psychological harm' in Week 18, directly aligning with Target 3.4 to promote mental health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with technical skills for employment (Target 4.4), while fostering an ethical mindset for sustainable development (Target 4.7).
